Introducing Oatmeal
Our new multi-theme marketing site kit

Reviews

Use these Tailwind CSS review components to display reviews, ratings, and testimonials to build trust with potential customers. These components are designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team, and include a variety of different styles and layouts.

PLUS / UI BLOCKS / ECOMMERCE / COMPONENTS / REVIEWS

Reviews

평점, 리뷰 요약, 개별 후기, 작성 CTA를 통해 구매 전 신뢰를 만드는 패턴입니다.

Tailwind Plus처럼 각 leaf의 첫 예제는 Preview와 Code를 함께 제공하고, 이후 예제는 Preview와 잠금 code CTA로 구분합니다. 우리 예시는 실제 화면 맥락에 맞춘 설명, tags, interaction feedback을 함께 보여줍니다.

ON THIS PAGE

4 examples
Multi-column
With summary chart
Avatars with separate description
Simple with avatars
Multi-column
EXAMPLE 01

Tailwind의 review 예시 이름과 개수를 맞춘 구매 후기 변형입니다.

reviews

May 16, 2026
★
★
★
★
★
Perfectly weighted and easy to carry.

The hardware feels substantial, the stitching is clean, and the bag keeps its shape even when it is packed for a full day.

Mark helpful
Michael Foster
May 12, 2026
★
★
★
★
★
The materials feel better than the photos suggested.

I wanted something that would look polished at work without feeling too formal. This lands exactly in that middle ground.

Mark helpful
Dries Vincent
Apr 29, 2026
★
★
★
★
★
I came back for a second color.

The interior pockets are simple but placed well. It has become the bag I reach for most mornings.

Mark helpful
Lindsay Walton
Apr 18, 2026
★
★
★
★
★
Packaging and delivery were excellent.

It arrived faster than expected and the presentation made it feel gift-ready. The color is very close to the product page.
